channel.title: News - English [KBS WORLD Radio] | International
channel.description: We provide you with the latest news from home and abroad, in addition to in-depth analysis on major issues, with a close eye on Northeast Asia and the Korean Peninsula in particular.

item.title: White House: Trump, Xi Reaffirm Goal to Denuclearize N. Korea at Summit
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump reaffirmed his goal of denuclearizing North Korea with Chinese President Xi Jinping during the two leaders’ summit in Beijing last week. In a fact sheet released on Sunday, the White House said the two leaders had “reached consensus" on several issues, including confirming ...

[more...]

image.title: White House: Trump, Xi Reaffirm Goal to Denuclearize N. Korea at Summit

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Says He Discussed North Korea, Taiwan, Iran with Xi in Beijing
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: U.S. President Donald Trump says he discussed a range of major issues, including North Korea, Taiwan and Iran, with Chinese President Xi Jinping during their summit in Beijing. Trump also claimed Xi asked him how the U.S. would respond if China attacked Taiwan.  Yun Sohyang has ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Says He Discussed North Korea, Taiwan, Iran with Xi in Beijing

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump: American, Nigerian Forces Eliminate ISIS Second-in-Command
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says American and Nigerian forces have eliminated the second-in-command of the Salafi-jihadist militant group Islamic State of Iraq and Syria(ISIS) in a combined military operation. Trump said in a Truth Social post on Friday that U.S. and Nigerian forces "flawlessly ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: American, Nigerian Forces Eliminate ISIS Second-in-Command

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Xi: 'Important Consensus' on Economics, Cooperation Reached at Summit
item.description:
[International] :
Chinese President Xi Jinping said he and U.S. President Donald Trump had reached an "important consensus" during their summit this week and affirmed his resolve to stabilize bilateral relations and strengthen communication between the two sides. China's state-run CCTV reported on Friday that Xi had ...

[more...]

image.title: Xi: 'Important Consensus' on Economics, Cooperation Reached at Summit

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Vice Foreign Minister to Visit Washington from May 18-21
item.description:
[International] :
Vice Foreign Minister Park Yoon-joo will travel to the United States next week to discuss follow-up measures related to security commitments from last year’s summit agreements. The foreign ministry said in a statement Friday that Park will visit Washington from May 18-21 to meet with U.S. Deputy ...

[more...]

image.title: Vice Foreign Minister to Visit Washington from May 18-21

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Says He Made ‘Fantastic Trade Deals’ with Xi
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says he and Chinese President Xi Jinping made “fantastic trade deals” during their summit in Beijing. On Friday, the last day of his three-day state visit, Trump met Xi for a bilateral meeting at Zhongnanhai, the leadership compound that houses Xi’s residence, and briefly ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Says He Made ‘Fantastic Trade Deals’ with Xi

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: China's Foreign Ministry Says Trump, Xi Reached 'New Common Understandings' During Summit
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping reached “a series of new common understandings” during their summit in Beijing on Thursday, according to China’s foreign ministry. A foreign ministry spokesperson revealed on Friday, in response to press queries, that Trump and Xi exchanged ...

[more...]

image.title: China's Foreign Ministry Says Trump, Xi Reached 'New Common Understandings' During Summit

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Indian-Flagged Cargo Ship Sinks in Omani Waters after Suspected Attack
item.description:
[International] :
An Indian-flagged cargo vessel has sunk after being attacked in waters near the Strait of Hormuz, according to Indian authorities. India’s shipping ministry said the wooden cargo ship, the Haji Ali, was attacked in the early hours of Wednesday morning off the coast of Oman, then caught fire and ...

[more...]

image.title: Indian-Flagged Cargo Ship Sinks in Omani Waters after Suspected Attack

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump: Xi Expressed Willingness to Assist in Reopening Strait of Hormuz
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says Chinese President Xi Jinping expressed willingness to offer assistance in reopening the Strait of Hormuz during their summit on Thursday. According to a prereleased clip from Trump’s interview with Fox News anchor Sean Hannity in Beijing on Thursday, the U.S. president ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: Xi Expressed Willingness to Assist in Reopening Strait of Hormuz

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Xi Stresses US-China Coexistence, but Warns Trump Not to Mishandle Taiwan Issue
item.description:
[International] :
Chinese President Xi Jinping emphasized coexistence between China and the United States during his summit with U.S. President Donald Trump on Thursday, invoking the concept of the “Thucydides trap,” which suggests that conflict can arise between a rising power and an established power. According to ...

[more...]

image.title: Xi Stresses US-China Coexistence, but Warns Trump Not to Mishandle Taiwan Issue

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: White House: Trump, Xi Agree Strait of Hormuz ‘Must Remain Open’
item.description:
[International] :
The White House says U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping have agreed that the Strait of Hormuz “must remain open” and that Iran can never have nuclear weapons. According to the official White House summary of Thursday’s bilateral summit in Beijing, the two leaders agreed ...

[more...]

image.title: White House: Trump, Xi Agree Strait of Hormuz ‘Must Remain Open’

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Foreign Ministry Won’t Rule Out Possibility of US-N. Korea Summit, but Says Plans Barely Underway
item.description:
[International] :
A government official says the possibility of a U.S.-North Korea summit taking place on the occasion of U.S. President Donald Trump’s visit to China cannot be ruled out, though related preparations are reportedly barely underway.  A senior foreign ministry official made the remark to reporters on ...

[more...]

image.title: Foreign Ministry Won’t Rule Out Possibility of US-N. Korea Summit, but Says Plans Barely Underway

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Describes Summit with Xi as ‘Great’
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump has described his summit talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping on Thursday as “great.” Trump gave the description when asked for comment while visiting Beijing’s Tiantan Park, also known as the Temple of Heaven, with Xi.  But Trump kept mum when asked if he and Xi ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Describes Summit with Xi as ‘Great’

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump Highlights ‘Fantastic Future' as Xi Warns against Conflict
item.description:
[International] :
Anchor: U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping met in Beijing on Thursday for a high-profile summit expected to include talks on trade, the Iran war, technology and Taiwan. Following a grand welcoming ceremony at the Great Hall of the People, the summit talks lasted more than two hours, ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump Highlights ‘Fantastic Future' as Xi Warns against Conflict

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US-China Summit Ends after 135 Minutes
item.description:
[International] :
China’s state-run China Central Television(CCTV) says the summit between Chinese President Xi Jinping and U.S. President Donald Trump was held for over two hours. According to the report, the summit began at 10:15 a.m. Thursday at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing and lasted for two hours and 15 ...

[more...]

image.title: US-China Summit Ends after 135 Minutes

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump, Xi Hold Talks amid Global Tensions
item.description:
[International] :
Chinese President Xi Jinping and U.S. President Donald Trump held summit talks at the Great Hall of the People in Beijing on Thursday amid mounting tensions and a stalemate in U.S.-Iran negotiations to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz. In his opening statement, Xi said the world has arrived at ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump, Xi Hold Talks amid Global Tensions

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Lee, Sheinbaum Discuss Advancing Cooperation in Phone Call
item.description:
[International] :
President Lee Jae Myung and Mexican President Claudia Sheinbaum have agreed to strengthen exchanges and cooperation between their countries, according to the top office in Seoul. Senior Cheong Wa Dae spokesperson Kang Yu-jung said on Thursday that the two leaders held phone talks, during which they also ...

[more...]

image.title: Lee, Sheinbaum Discuss Advancing Cooperation in Phone Call

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Senior Official Says It’s Unlikely Anyone but Iran Was behind HMM Namu Attack
item.description:
[International] :
The government believes Iran was likely behind the attack on the South Korean-operated HMM Namu cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz earlier this month. A high-ranking foreign ministry official told reporters Thursday there is a low possibility that any entity other than Iran was responsible for the attack, ...

[more...]

image.title: Senior Official Says It’s Unlikely Anyone but Iran Was behind HMM Namu Attack

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Xi Calls for China-US Partnership, while Trump Predicts Ties Will Get ‘Better than Ever Before’
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping have begun their high-stakes summit in Beijing. At the top of the meeting inside the Great Hall of the People on Thursday, Xi said the world has “arrived at a new crossroads” in the wake of “intertwined turbulence and transformation” ...

[more...]

image.title: Xi Calls for China-US Partnership, while Trump Predicts Ties Will Get ‘Better than Ever Before’

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Beijing: Trump, Xi Meet for Critical Summit
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping met for summit talks at the Great Hall of the People​ in Beijing on Thursday morning. The summit comes amid a stalemate in U.S.-Iran negotiations to end the war and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, with both Trump and Xi likely to leverage the ...

[more...]

image.title: Beijing: Trump, Xi Meet for Critical Summit

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: US Senate Approves Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair
item.description:
[International] :
The U.S. Senate has approved the nomination of Kevin Warsh as the new chair of the Federal Reserve, enabling him to succeed current chair Jerome Powell at the end of his term on Friday. The nominee was confirmed on Wednesday with 54 votes in favor and 45 against, which is the narrowest margin for a Federal ...

[more...]

image.title: US Senate Approves Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump, Xi to Hold Summit in Beijing on Thurs.
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump and Chinese President Xi Jinping are set to hold summit talks in Beijing on Thursday. Trump landed at Beijing Capital International Airport on Wednesday night for a three-day state visit, nine years after his previous visit during his first term in office. Trump is scheduled ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump, Xi to Hold Summit in Beijing on Thurs.

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Vance: Progress Being Made in Peace Talks with Iran; Aim to Satisfy Trump’s ‘Red Line’
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. Vice President JD Vance says progress is being made in negotiations with Iran to end the war, after U.S. President Donald Trump rejected Iran’s response to a U.S. proposal as “unacceptable.” During a press conference at the White House on Wednesday, Vance said though he thinks the two sides are ...

[more...]

image.title: Vance: Progress Being Made in Peace Talks with Iran; Aim to Satisfy Trump’s ‘Red Line’

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Seoul Hosts Korea-Africa Partnership Forum ahead of Foreign Ministers’ Meeting
item.description:
[International] :
Experts and government officials from South Korea and dozens of African countries gathered in Seoul on Wednesday for a forum on the partnership between South Korea and Africa. Hosted by the Ministry of Foreign Affairs and the Korea National Diplomatic Academy, the Korea-Africa Partnership forum focused on ...

[more...]

image.title: Seoul Hosts Korea-Africa Partnership Forum ahead of Foreign Ministers’ Meeting

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Finance Minister, Chinese Vice Premier Discuss Economic Cooperation, Middle East Situation
item.description:
[International] :
Finance Minister Koo Yun-cheol has met with Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng and discussed the direction of bilateral economic cooperation. In a social media post on Wednesday, Koo said he had dinner with He in Incheon the previous day, where the two exchanged views on recent economic issues, the situation ...

[more...]

image.title: Finance Minister, Chinese Vice Premier Discuss Economic Cooperation, Middle East Situation

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: National Security Adviser: No Grounds to Confirm Drones Attacked HMM Namu
item.description:
[International] :
National security adviser Wi Sung-lac says there are no grounds to determine conclusively that the aerial objects that struck the South Korean-operated HMM Namu cargo ship in the Strait of Hormuz were drones. Speaking on Wednesday at a meeting with the Korea News Editors’ Association at the Seoul Press ...

[more...]

image.title: National Security Adviser: No Grounds to Confirm Drones Attacked HMM Namu

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: President Lee Discusses Bilateral Cooperation in Meetings with Bessent, He Lifeng
item.description:
[International] :
President Lee Jae Myung has met with U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent and Chinese Vice Premier He Lifeng, who are visiting Seoul to fine-tune views on the agenda for the U.S.-China summit. Lee met with the two officials Wednesday, a day ahead of the summit between U.S. President Donald Trump and ...

[more...]

image.title: President Lee Discusses Bilateral Cooperation in Meetings with Bessent, He Lifeng

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump: No Need for Xi's Help for Iran
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump says he will have a long talk with Chinese President Xi Jinping about the war in Iran. Speaking to reporters ahead of his trip to Beijing on Tuesday, Trump however claimed that he is not going to need Xi's help over Iran.  [Sound bite: US President Donald ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump: No Need for Xi's Help for Iran

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Top Office: S. Korea Closely Communicating with Int’l Community to Ensure Safe Passage in Strait
item.description:
[International] :
National security adviser Wi Sung-lac says South Korea is actively taking part in the international community’s discussions on cooperation to ensure safe passage for ships in the Strait of Hormuz and is closely communicating with relevant countries.  Wi made the remarks on Wednesday in a keynote speech ...

[more...]

image.title: Top Office: S. Korea Closely Communicating with Int’l Community to Ensure Safe Passage in Strait

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio

item.title: Trump to Arrive in Beijing for 3-Day State Visit, Summit with Xi
item.description:
[International] :
U.S. President Donald Trump is set to arrive in Beijing on Wednesday for a three-day state visit, nine years after his previous visit during his first term in office. After landing at Beijing Capital International Airport on Wednesday night, Trump is scheduled to meet Chinese President Xi Jinping at the ...

[more...]

image.title: Trump to Arrive in Beijing for 3-Day State Visit, Summit with Xi

item.author: KBS WORLD Radio
